questions.question: Highlight a sentence or phrase from the text that supports your answer to Part A.

responses.content: she feels uncomfortable, upset, disgusted and wanting to cry (sad)

questions.question: Part A: Which of the following abilities does the narrator mainly believe older people have that younger people don't?

responses.content: she felt like the sweater hurt her and she felt disgusted, uncomfortable, upset and etc.
"My body was shaking like when you have hiccups" and "My face all hot and saliva coming out of my mouth" are the perfect sentences to describe what Rachel's body does
